title: Enchantment Level Language Patch – Roman Numerals Addon
description: Roman Numerals Expansion Pack for Enchantment Level Language Patch
body:
This project redistributes the Arabic/Roman numerals add-on for
Enchantment Level Language Patch with explicit permission from the
original author.

🔗 Main mod:
https://modrinth.com/mod/enchlevel-langpatch

In the original project, this add-on is distributed as an additional
or source file under the same version, which prevents launchers using
the Modrinth/CurseForge API from downloading or updating it correctly.
This project exists solely to provide a launcher-compatible
distribution of the add-on.

🔹 This is an add-on, not a standalone mod.
🔹 The main Enchantment Level Language Patch mod is required.
🔹 No functionality has been modified; the file is identical to the
   original add-on.

License: CC0-1.0
